summary: RBAC User/League Governance Testing Complete - 30/30 backend tests PASSED, Frontend UI fully functional. All new governance features working correctly: Users table with league counts (C/A/M), last_login, soft-delete with orphan protection; Leagues page with owner, admin count, Gestisci button; League management modal with transfer ownership and admin toggle.

frontend_tests.user_leagues_modal: PASS - Opens on league count click, shows league details
frontend_tests.leagues_table: PASS - Shows Owner, Admin count, Gestisci button
frontend_tests.league_manage_modal: PASS - Transfer ownership dropdown, members list with admin toggle

verified_features: GET /api/rbac/users returns leagues_created, leagues_admin, leagues_member, last_login, is_deleted
GET /api/rbac/users/{id}/leagues returns detailed league list with membership_role, is_owner, is_creator
PUT /api/rbac/users/{id}/soft-delete soft deletes user (sets is_deleted=true, is_disabled=true)
PUT /api/rbac/users/{id}/soft-delete blocks if user is sole owner/admin (409 with orphan_leagues)
PUT /api/rbac/users/{id}/soft-delete cannot delete super_admin or yourself
GET /api/rbac/leagues returns leagues with owner (id/username/email), admins list, member_count
GET /api/rbac/leagues/{id}/members returns all league members with roles and is_owner flag
PUT /api/rbac/leagues/{id}/transfer-owner transfers ownership and updates membership roles
Login endpoint sets last_login timestamp on user
All RBAC actions logged in audit with before/after fields
Frontend Users table shows Leghe column with C/A/M format
Frontend Users table shows Ultimo Login column
Frontend Elimina button opens soft-delete modal
Frontend click on league count opens modal with detailed league list
Frontend Leagues page shows owner, admin count, Gestisci button
Frontend Gestisci modal shows transfer ownership dropdown and member list with admin toggle
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is complete and correct for all governance features
Orphan league protection working as expected - blocks deletion when user is sole owner/admin
Audit logging includes before/after for all RBAC actions
Frontend admin_ui.py correctly implements all UI elements from spec
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing users and leagues
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC User/League Governance complete. All features tested: users table with league counts (C/A/M), last_login, soft-delete with orphan protection; leagues management with owner transfer and admin toggle. National league 'Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic' has no owner (shown as 'Nessuno'). Private leagues have owners. The admin UI at /api/admin-ui is a vanilla JS HTML page served from admin_ui.py.
